name: Castellum, Inc.
business: Castellum sells technology services, solutions, and products in cybersecurity, IT, electronic warfare, information warfare, system modernization, and information operations to U.S. government agencies, financial services, legal, and other large data application users. Services include intelligence analysis, software development, software engineering, program management, strategic and mission planning, information assurance, cybersecurity and policy support, data analytics, and model based systems engineering.

exposures.sentence: Services include intelligence analysis, software development, software engineering, program management, strategic and mission planning, information assurance, cybersecurity and policy support, data analytics, and model based systems engineering ( MBSE ).
Our expertise and technology support national security missions and government modernization for intelligence, defense, and federal civilian customers.

Our software-defined, full-spectrum cyber, electronic warfare, and Counter-Unmanned Aircraft Systems solutions provide electromagnetic spectrum advantage and deliver precision effects against national security threats.
Castellum specializes in planning and intelligence support for information warfare and information operations ( IW/IO ).
Castellum ... market areas: ... Command, Control, Communications, and Computer ( C4 ) Intelligence Surveillance Reconnaissance ( C4ISR ), Cyber & Space.

We are at the forefront of developing policies that meet the challenges of 5G wireless communications both on and off the battlefield, millimeter wave, and the use of lasers for free space optical communications and long-range sensing.

Our software-defined, full-spectrum cyber, electronic warfare, and Counter-Unmanned Aircraft Systems solutions provide electromagnetic spectrum advantage and deliver precision effects against national security threats.
We support the development, qualification and deployment of specialty ISR sensors on military and commercial UAVs and aircraft.
We implement Agile and DevSecOps methodologies supporting rapid, secure, and continuous delivery of mission-critical capabilities.
They can be delivered to on-premises enclaves or customers who rely upon cloud-based infrastructures.

catalysts.event: Award of $103.3 million contract for PMA-290 Special Missions
catalysts.sentence: the award in March 2024, to the Company's subsidiary, Global Technologies Management Resources, Inc. ( GTMR ) of a $103.3 million, five and one-half year contract for Special Missions Management of On-Site Services in support of the Naval Air Systems Command ( NAVAIR ) Program Office 290 ( PMA-290 ) Special Missions which ramped up during 2025

catalysts.event: Payoff of notes payable to Buckhout Charitable Remainder Trust and Robert Eisiminger
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, the note payable with the Buckhout Charitable Remainder Trust and the two promissory notes payable to Robert Eisiminger were paid off.
